title: A Resolution and adopting the Municipal Risk Reduction and Management Council (MDRRMC) Resolution No. 2025-06 dated July 25, 2025, entitled, "Resolution Realigning the Appropriation for the Indemnification under the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund Current Appropriation CY 2025 amounting to One Hundred Thousand Pesos (Php 100,000.00) for various purposes and approving the same."
